name: Bauhaus

voice.summary: Bauhaus stationery press: circle + square + triangle hero icon, red + yellow + blue + cream, Universal-style geometric type.
preferred_motifs: overlapping primary-color circle, square, and triangle arranged in Bauhaus compositional hierarchy on cream ground

required_signals: Borders are 1px hairlines in a chrome tone
forbidden_signals: Hard 2px+ borders (reads as poster, breaks editorial register)

source.accent_evidence: The wordmark 'BAUHAUS' in the header uses this red, and the thick border framing the nav bar repeats it — it is the first flat brand color the eye lands on and frames every call-to-action area.
